LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT EMMET MCMAHON DBA MCMAHON CONSTRUCTION'S MOTION TO DENY DEFENDANT O'NEILL CONSTRUCTION'S APPLICATION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT- THE MOTION TO CONTEST O'NEILL'S APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS DENIED. SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE FINDING THAT THE SETTLEMENT IS IN THE BALLPARK UNDER TECH-BILT, INC. V. WOODWARD-CLYDE & ASSOC., 38 CAL.3D 488 (1985) AND THE OBJECTOR FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE SETTLEMENT LACKS GOOD FAITH. SEE CCP 877.6(D). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: TEANNA L. WARD, CSR NO. 119118

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Of Emmett Mcmahon Dba Mcmahon Construction O'Neill Construction'S Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SCOTT H. WECHSLER, TEL. NO. 777-9700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN H. FLEISCHER OF VAN DE POEL, LEVY & ALLEN LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 934-6102;
ATTY. STEVEN W. FERLA OF MENEKSHE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (408) 358-1200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT EMMET MCMAHON;
ATTY. DARA M. TANG OF HAYES SCOTT BONINO & MCLAY, LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 486-2899 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT PANORAMIC.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EMMET MCMAHON DBA MCMAHON CONSTRUCTION'S MOTION TO DENY DEFENDANT O'Neill Construction'S Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement- The motion to contest O'Neill's application for good faith settlement is denied. Substantial evidence supports the finding that the settlement is in the ballpark under Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward-Clyde & Assoc., 38 Cal.3d 488 (1985) and the objector fails to show that the settlement lacks good faith. See CCP 877.6(d). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 =302/JM

Mtn To Contest App For Good Faith Determination
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SCOTT H. WECHSLER, TEL. NO. 777-9700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN H. FLEISCHER OF VAN DE POEL, LEVY & ALLEN LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 934-6102;
ATTY. STEVEN W. FERLA OF MENEKSHE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (408) 358-1200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT EMMET MCMAHON;
ATTY. DARA M. TANG OF HAYES SCOTT BONINO & MCLAY, LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 486-2899 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT PANORAMIC.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT PANORAMIC LLC'S MOTION To Contest O'Neill's Application For Good Faith Determination - The motion to contest O'Neill's application for good faith settlement is denied. Substantial evidence supports the finding that the settlement is in the ballpark under Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward-Clyde & Assoc., 38 Cal.3d 488 (1985) and the objector fails to show that the settlement lacks good faith. See CCP 877.6(d). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 =302/JM
